global.description: The ad features a bold red background with prominent text and decorative elements.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection of bestsellers.

elements.label: Solid red background
elements.description: A vibrant solid red background fills the entire canvas, creating a bold visual impact.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'VantaStyle' in a modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A simple rectangular shape with a light color, possibly representing a product or feature, located in the center.

elements.label: Decorative circle
elements.description: A small circular shape in a muted color, positioned in the center, possibly indicating a product option.

elements.label: Decorative circle
elements.description: Another small circular shape in a muted color, similar to the previous one, located near the center.

elements.label: Decorative circle
elements.description: A third small circular shape in a muted color, positioned in the center, complementing the other circles.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'New collection drop' with a subtext 'Shop bestsellers now' below it, centrally aligned.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The text 'UGC' appears in a small font at the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Order now' in white, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small text element labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left corner, possibly indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bold and modern, promoting new collection.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: New collection drop, Shop bestsellers now, VantaStyle, Order now, UGC
